name: ground_truth_cp9_backup_protection_nc
description: Ground-truth fixture from active Example System IATT CCIS workbook (row 155, CCI-000540, assessed 2026-05-27). Non-Compliant verdict — backup confidentiality/integrity/availability protections not documented. Narrative uses 'Examined/Finding' structure with 'have not been provided' gap language. The phrase 'have not been provided' should hit _GAP_PHRASES ('has not been' or 'have not been' pattern). 'Examined' hits _AFFIRMING_PHRASES. If both fire: AMBIGUOUS -> may or may not match NC depending on _expected_status_for_class behavior. UPDATE 2026-06-18: the _GAP_PHRASES coverage gap this case documented is now FIXED — the 'Examined/Finding' gap wording classifies GAP_DESCRIBING, so the human-verified Non-Compliant verdict is ACCEPTED on the first pass instead of being forced to an abstain by status_narrative_mismatch.

ccis_row.guidance: 000540: The organization protects the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of backup information at storage locations.
ccis_row.procedures: The organization conducting the inspection/assessment obtains and examines the system security plan and ensures backup information at the storage location is protected IAW the system security plan.

tagged_evidence:
## Tagged evidence
- System Security Plan (SSP) — reviewed for backup information storage protection references.
- Backup infrastructure documentation request — no artifacts provided demonstrating CIA protections for backup storage.
